title: Fermented Creamy Thai Shrimp Soup
description: A creamy, fermented Thai-inspired shrimp soup that balances rich coconut milk with tangy fermented fish sauce, finished with fresh herbs for a kid-friendly, comforting bowl.
instructions: Bring water, coconut milk, ginger, garlic, and shallot to a gentle simmer in a medium pot.
Stir in fermented fish sauce, soy sauce, lime juice, and a teaspoon of sugar, letting the flavors meld for 2 minutes.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until pink and opaque; if using tofu, add it here and cook 3-4 minutes.
Add the mixed vegetables and simmer for another 1-2 minutes until just tender.
Turn off the heat and stir in fresh basil and cilantro, allowing them to wilt slightly.
Taste and adjust seasoning with more lime juice or fish sauce if desired.
Serve hot over cooked rice or with rice noodles if preferred.
